title: Implementation-layer ledger and runtime gap report
dependency_note: LT-L0-W01 machine evidence is complete and G1 remains blocked only on manual human acceptance; LT-L0-W02-T01 is an independent read-only ledger regeneration entry point.

review_policy.note: Per user instruction, full Claude review execution is skipped going forward and must not be counted as a valid review receipt.

tuw_evidence.title: Measure Wave 1 candidate feature execution surfaces

commands.command: node - <<'NODE' ... parse docs/launch/runtime-gap-report.md feature rows, required command sections, and 127.0.0.1 binding ... NODE

commands.output: API routes 4, data routes 3, 127.0.0.1 mentions 2, live runtime true write flags 0, Wave 1 feature rows 7
commands.purpose: Compute Wave 1 feature runtime surface measurements

commands.output: server binds 127.0.0.1 at HOST and comment documents local-only binding

commands.command: rg -n "writes_product_state: true|creates_database_rows: true|updates_database_rows: true|deletes_database_rows: true|writes_object_storage: true|stores_idp_secret: true|dispatches_sso_runtime: true|executes_api_handler: true|dispatches_filing_runtime: true|persists_workflow_attempt: true" packages/enterprise packages/authz packages/matter packages/dms packages/email-dms apps/api/src || true
commands.output: No runtime true-write flags in measured runtime files; one true flag appears only in packages/enterprise/test/model.test.js when the broader command includes tests.
commands.purpose: Confirm measured Wave 1 runtime files do not open product-state write paths
Launch TUW workbook ledger integrity check

notes: The runtime gap report records measurement commands for every Wave 1 row.
The current API server is master-data only; no dedicated authentication, matter, DMS/document, Outlook filing, or Work Queue API route is open.
Authorization is present as a fail-closed permission gate over the three data routes, not as a standalone persisted permission API.
Audit has two in-memory write methods and no durable audit persistence in the measured surface.

commands.purpose: Verify 7 feature by 5 RTG matrix and partial/absent evidence fields

commands.command: grep -o '| 충족 |' docs/launch/runtime-gap-report.md | wc -l; grep -o '| 부분 |' docs/launch/runtime-gap-report.md | wc -l; grep -o '| 부재 |' docs/launch/runtime-gap-report.md | wc -l

commands.output: Implementation layer ledger validation passed. packs: 987
commands.purpose: Confirm runtime gap matrix still rests on valid implementation-layer ledger

notes: The 14 absent cells are the primary L2/L4 rebaseline input for missing runtime capability.
The 19 partial cells require runtime admission, durable evidence, or dedicated routes before they can become satisfied.
The two satisfied cells are limited to authorization RTG-002 and RTG-004 based on fail-closed local API behavior.

blocking_condition.reason: LT-L0-W02-T04 requires a human approval record for the runtime gap report and L2/L4 rebaseline input. Codex must not synthesize this approval.
required_to_unblock: A designated Launch owner / runtime rebaseline approver changes the Approval Record in docs/launch/runtime-gap-report.md from pending_human_approval to an approved decision.
After approval, rerun the T04 row-count and G2 evidence path checks and update this TUW status from blocked_pending_human_approval to passed.

notes: The rebaseline input package is issued and complete for review.
L2 and L4 remain provisional until human approval is recorded.
No approval, deferral, or G2 closeout was synthesized.

blocked_claims: This record does not close LT-L0-W02.
This record does not synthesize runtime gap report approval.
This record does not claim L2 or L4 rebaseline approval.
This record does not claim G2 is closed.
This record does not treat the user review waiver as valid review evidence.
